subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario
precis: Appointment of the Honourable Mark L. Edwards, Regional Senior Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario for the Central East Region, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario.
